title: JUIT CE – PLACEMENTS
content: JUIT CE – PLACEMENTS Through various on–campus placement drives, the number of students from Civil Engineering Department who received offers from various companies are: Batch 2018-2022 2017-2021 2016-2020 2015-2019 2014-2018 No. of Eligible Students 28 15 27 46 33 No. of Students Placed 18 08 11 19 08 Details of Offers from Various Batches 2018-2022 Batch Rishabh Jaswal placed in Amazon India. 12 students placed in Jaypee Group, India. Anushka Anand and Amish Kartik placed in JMC Projects (India) Ltd. Saijal Verma and Vishali Thapta placed in Infosys, India. Passang Dorji placed in Bitumix India LLP. Contact Details For Civil Engineering Placement Related Queries, please contact: Mr. Kaushal Kumar Assistant Professor (Grade-II) Email: kaushal.kumar@juit.ac.in Phone: +91-1792-239324 (O), +91-9891076078 (M)
